description: CompositionBlack, short sleeve polyester t-shirt with contemporary slant graphic print in dark grey, white and redWash careHand wash or machine washWith a head turning, sport inspired graphic running from the right shoulder to the left waist, this polyester tee made of Climalite cotton of the Pro Evolution Soccer (PES) range from adidas is a perfect wear for Sports and at the gym. The dark grey stripes along the top of the sleeves enhances one's style quotient. Team this with cargoes or jeans and flaunt your well-toned biceps in this short-sleeved shirt.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-19"
